title: Feed To Workflow Dispatch
description: Inspect the RSS/Atom feed dispatch path into an explicit workbench workflow task.
prompt: Inspect this repo's feed-to-workflow path. Explain how feed polling/collection dispatches into the openai-codex-bindings workbench task, and identify the explicit command shape that should be benchmarked. Do not use codex exec.

checklist: Prefer `feed dispatch` as the benchmarked trigger path.
